title: International Development DoView Boards
subtitle: A DoView Collection - Illustrative International Development boards
instruction: Click the white boxes to open the live International Development DoView Boards.

boards.title: Climate-Resilient Agriculture and Food Security
boards.description: Food systems, rural livelihoods, resilience, adaptation, and food security.

boards.title: Girls' Education and Women's Economic Empowerment
boards.description: Education, skills, safety, economic participation, and empowerment outcomes.

boards.title: Primary Health Care Strengthening
boards.description: Access, quality, workforce, community health, and stronger primary health systems.

boards.title: Clean Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene
boards.description: Water access, sanitation, hygiene behaviours, health, and sustainability.

boards.title: Youth Employment and Skills Development
boards.description: Skills pathways, employability, jobs, enterprise, and inclusive labour-market outcomes.
